intended_use: SMART Bun-Yo-Matic X-Ray software is to be used by orthopaedic healthcare professionals for diagnosis and surgical planning in a hospital or clinic environment. The medical imaging type intended to be
intended_use_full: SMART Bun-Yo-Matic X-Ray software is to be used by orthopaedic healthcare professionals for diagnosis and surgical planning in a hospital or clinic environment. The medical imaging type intended to be used as the input of the software is X-ray. The SMART Bun-Yo-Matic X-Ray software provides: Visualization report of the three-dimensional mathematical models of the anatomical structures of the foot and ankle and three-dimensional models of orthopaedic fixation devices, Measurement templates containing radiographic measures of foot and ankle, Surgical planning application for visualization of foot and ankle anatomical three-dimensional structures, radiographic measures, and surgical instrument parameters.
target_condition: Hallux valgus and other foot and ankle orthopedic conditions
ground_truth: Ground truth established by 2 clinicians with over 5 years of experience who manually marked the presence of bone in dorsoplantar and lateral x-ray images on a spreadsheet
other_metrics: Model conformance 95% within 1.0mm distance to reference model; angular measurements 2.0 degrees standard deviation; surgical planning estimated correction ±1 degree for angular measurements and ±1.0 mm for distance measurements
